title: Post-M8 UI remediation release-readiness verdict update
summary: Update release-readiness evidence after UI/playability remediation while preserving public release, Web and Windows owner gates.
acceptance: Records which owner UI/playability blockers are resolved, partially resolved or still blocking release readiness
Updates UI, playability, i18n and responsive verdicts without changing Web demo-only or Windows controlled-test verdicts
Keeps public release, EA, store, signing, telemetry, accounts, paid services and public save compatibility owner-gated
Includes remaining art production needs and whether a release-candidate audit can proceed
Does not create or execute public release tasks

history.details: Updated post-M8 UI/playability readiness verdict; blocker matrix, roadmap/matrix/project-state updated; Web demo-only and Windows controlled-test verdicts preserved; no public release task created; required checks pass.

verified: No blocking findings; verified blocker-by-blocker UI/playability status, Web demo-only and Windows unsigned controlled-test verdict preservation, owner-gated public release/store/signing/telemetry/accounts/paid-services/public-save boundaries, remaining art/authoritative-gameplay residuals, and audit-only RC gap-assessment wording.
Merged commit b9d6797 into main; handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, and pnpm quality passed on main.

forbiddenPaths: telemetry, accounts, hosted feedback or paid services
changing Web demo-only or Windows controlled-test verdicts without owner approval

review.summary: No blocking findings; verified blocker-by-blocker UI/playability status, Web demo-only and Windows unsigned controlled-test verdict preservation, owner-gated public release/store/signing/telemetry/accounts/paid-services/public-save boundaries, remaining art/authoritative-gameplay residuals, and audit-only RC gap-assessment wording.

integration.summary: Merged commit b9d6797 into main; handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, and pnpm quality passed on main.
